/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/argus_cudabayerdemosaic.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus_cudabayerdemosaic.dir/CudaBayerDemosaicConsumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus_cudabayerdemosaic.dir/argus_cudabayerdemosaic_generated_CudaBayerDemosaicKernel.cu.o -o argus_cudabayerdemosaic  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra: /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra/libnvargus_socketclient.so ../utils/libargussampleutils.a -lcuda /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libEGL.so -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLESv2.so.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra/libnvbufsurface.so
